headline: Red Sox Get Blanked At Fenway While Celtics Falter Against The Sixers
morning_brew: Are you kiddin' me with this? The Yankees come into Fenway Park and shut us out on four hits? Absolute disastah. I'm standing there on Yawkey Way before the game thinking we might actually show some life, but instead, we get zero runs and another loss. We're 9-14 now and sitting in the basement of the AL East. It's wicked frustrating watching this lineup go cold the second the pinstripes show up in our house. We need a spark, and we need it yesterday.

Then you look at the C's. Jaylen Brown drops 36 points and plays his heart out, but the rest of the squad decides to take the night off? 97 points in a playoff game is brutal. Jayson Tatum had 19, which is fine for the boards and assists, but we need him to be the killer we know he is. Losing by 14 to Philly at home in the playoffs is just unacceptable. This team is too talented to be sleepwalking through the first round like this.

The only bright spot was the B's over at the Garden—well, they were on the road, but you know what I mean. Viktor Arvidsson was a beast with two goals and Jeremy Swayman stood on his head with 33 saves. Buffalo is a tough out this year, but we took care of business to grab that 4-2 win. That's the kind of grit we need from every team in this town right now. At least someone remembers how to win a playoff game.

trend_watch.trend: Scored two goals in the 4-2 playoff win over the Sabres.
trend_watch.dans_take: This kid is playing out of his mind right now and exactly what we need in a physical series.

trend_watch.trend: Put up 36 points on 11-of-24 shooting in the loss to Philly.
trend_watch.dans_take: He was the only one who looked like he wanted to be there last night—the rest of the team needs to wake up.

trend_watch.trend: Tossed 1.2 scoreless innings with 3 strikeouts against the Yankees.
trend_watch.dans_take: One of the few guys in a Sox uniform who didn't look scared of the moment yesterday.

news_digest.headline: 2026 NBA playoffs: Eastern Conference first-round takeaways
news_digest.dans_take: The takeaway is simple: if we don't start hitting shots, this is gonna be a short spring.

news_digest.headline: MLB 2026: Early-season stats and numbers we're watching
news_digest.dans_take: The only stat I'm watching is the 'L' column and it's getting way too crowded.

news_digest.headline: 2026 NFL mock draft: Schrager projects 32 first-round picks
news_digest.dans_take: The draft is right around the corner and we better hope for some help on the roster.
